title: Part Information
description: Specify what part you need and add details.

labels.garage_picker: Pick a vehicle from your Garage

placeholders.description: Provide any specific details, OEM numbers, or special requirements.

hints.category: Choose the closest category for accurate seller matching.

hints.photos_empty: Files will be encrypted on submission
hints.status: "Broadcasting" sends your request to verified sellers instantly. Sellers can then bid with price and availability.

hints.guidelines2: Specify the condition (New/Used/Genuine) in the detailed description.
hints.media_speed: High-quality photos speed up your quotes
hints.browse_drop: Tap to browse or drop here

status.wait_sync: Wait while we sync to storage

dialogs.edit_description: Modify the details of your request to help sellers provide more accurate quotes.
